heading: Effective date
label: 7341 Effective date
text: The provisions of this chapter shall take effect one hundred and twenty days after the Secretary first takes office, or on such earlier date as the President may prescribe and publish in the Federal Register, except that at any time after , (1) any of the officers provided for in subchapters II and IV of this chapter may be nominated and appointed, as provided in those subchapters, and (2) the Secretary and the Commission may promulgate regulations pursuant to at any time after . Funds available to any department or agency (or any official or component thereof), functions of which are transferred to the Secretary or the Commission by this chapter, may with the approval of the Director of the Office of Management and Budget, be used to pay the compensation and expenses of any officer appointed pursuant to this subsection until such time as funds for that purpose are otherwise available.August 4, 1977August 4, 1977section 7295(b)(2) of this title1So in original.1
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Department of Energy Organization Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 95–9191 Stat. 565section 7101 of this titleAug. 4, 1977

Executive Order No. 12009Ex. Ord. No. 12009, , 42 F.R. 46267, which prescribed , as the effective date of this chapter, was revoked by Ex. Ord. No. 12553, , 51 F.R. 7237.Sept. 13, 1977Oct. 1, 1977Feb. 25, 1986
